name: astrocam
plate_scale_notes: Nominal: Camera Module v2 stock lens, 62.2 deg horizontal / 3280 px. Not yet measured from a solve.
pole_prior_notes: Full-res Bayer pixel coords; see occlusion.json pole_prior_notes for provenance.
rotate_180_notes: Astrocam is mounted with the sensor inverted relative to the published frame; rotate before stretching to JPEG.
pedestal_notes: Sensor floor of the IMX219 raw output. Measured 2026-06-15 from sampled deep-night (00-02 UTC) frames across nights 2026-06-10..12: global min 519, p1 519, median 539. Astrocam stores raw 10-bit counts (no 16-bit bit-shift), so the pedestal is order-of-magnitude smaller than v3w's 4380.
night_layout_notes: YYYY-MM-DD/HH/MMSS.fits.fz (UTC dirs); night membership decided by DATE-OBS within the noon-rollover window.
state_notes: Night starts at sun -10 deg below horizon (ephem), matching eclipticam-v3w/v1 at the same site so all cameras transition together. Was the -12 default before 2026-06-20.
reference_nights_notes: Known dark/clear baseline overlaid on the combined-brightness chart (drawn coloured dashed). Same reference night as eclipticam-v3w. The latest night is drawn bold dashed black.
